topic: Google Agentic Terminal Agent 2026: ReAct Loop + MCP + 1M Context Setup Guide
keyword: google agentic terminal agent mcp guide

key_points: Gemini CLI implements a Reason-and-Act (ReAct) loop: User Input → Reasoning → Tool Selection → Action → Observation → Reasoning
1M token context window allows loading massive codebases without chunking
Free tier: 60 requests/min and 1,000 requests/day with a personal Google account
Built-in tools: Google Search grounding, file operations, shell commands, web fetching
MCP tool discovery via discoverMcpTools() iterates through configured servers from settings.json
Establishes connections using Stdio, SSE, or Streamable HTTP transport
Fetches tool definitions and sanitizes/validates tool schemas for Gemini API compatibility
ReAct loop reads errors and attempts fixes automatically when a command fails
Gemini CLI wins on free tier and context window: 1,000 req/day free with 1M token context
Claude Code wins on code quality: 80.9% SWE-bench Verified, 95% first-pass accuracy
Codex CLI rebuilt in Rust: 77.3% Terminal-Bench 2.0 with MCP and kernel-level sandboxing
Gemini CLI added Plan Mode in March 2026: read-only phase before writing files
Configure MCP servers in ~/.gemini/settings.json under mcpServers block
Enable/disable servers with: gemini mcp enable/disable <name>
Use /mcp command to list configured servers, connection status, and available tools
Environment variables in env block are auto-expanded for secure credential management
Google ADK (Agent Development Kit) integrates with Gemini CLI for multi-agent workflows
ADK supports Python, Go, Java, and TypeScript
ADK agents can act as MCP clients and expose tools via MCP servers
Gemini CLI + ADK eliminates friction between terminal interface and complex agent orchestration

stats.fact: Gemini CLI free tier offers 60 requests/minute and 1,000 requests/day with a personal Google account
Gemini 2.5 Pro has a 1M token context window — roughly 5x the capacity of Claude standard tiers and 8x that of GPT-4o
A 600K-token Next.js codebase was loaded and Gemini 2.5 Pro correctly identified a bug across four modules without chunking or RAG
Claude Code achieves 80.9% SWE-bench Verified score and 95% first-pass accuracy; Codex CLI scores 77.3% on Terminal-Bench 2.0
52% of executives in gen AI-using organizations now have AI agents deployed in their organizations as of 2026
Gemini CLI added Plan Mode in March 2026 — a read-only phase restricting file writes until a strategy is proposed and approved
Google ADK supports four programming languages as of 2026: Python, Go, Java, and TypeScript
Gemini 2.5 Pro outscores GPT-4o on coding benchmarks according to 2026 testing data
